name: digital-gardening-kit
description: Kit de ferramentas para a jardinagem digital

scripts.test: node --test scripts/audience_boundary.test.js scripts/check_pt_text.test.js scripts/deploy_site_workflow.test.js scripts/devcontainer_contract.test.js scripts/doc_host_path_contract.test.js scripts/feed_sources.test.mjs scripts/information_architecture.test.js scripts/inbox_from_telegram.test.mjs scripts/lab_shell_contract.test.mjs scripts/notebook_cell_output_lint.test.mjs scripts/notebook_export_runtime_helpers.test.mjs scripts/notebook_path.test.cjs scripts/prepare_lab_datasets.test.mjs scripts/publication_outbox.test.mjs scripts/publish_to_telegram.test.mjs scripts/release_package_smoke.test.js scripts/site_ux_contract.test.js scripts/templates_contract.test.js scripts/validate_onboarding.test.js scripts/vault_primitives_contract.test.js scripts/generate_vault_data.test.mjs scripts/sync_lockfile_template.test.mjs scripts/package_version_contract.test.mjs scripts/release_version_contract.test.mjs packages/cli/test/commands.test.js packages/cli/test/dgk_script_dependencies_contract.test.js packages/cli/test/doctor.test.js packages/cli/test/etl.test.js packages/cli/test/evaluate.test.js packages/cli/test/frontmatter.test.js packages/cli/test/inbox.test.js packages/cli/test/index.test.js packages/cli/test/lab.test.js packages/cli/test/launcher.test.js packages/cli/test/note.test.js packages/cli/test/obsidian.test.js packages/cli/test/outbox.test.js packages/cli/test/package_manifest.test.js packages/cli/test/preview.test.js packages/cli/test/publish.test.js packages/cli/test/serve.test.js packages/cli/test/silo.test.js packages/cli/test/sow.test.js packages/cli/test/vscode.test.js
scripts.lint:main: markdownlint --config .markdownlint.json "10 - Diário/**/*.md" "20 - Projetos/**/*.md" "30 - Áreas/**/*.md" "40 - Recursos/**/*.md" "50 - Arquivo/**/*.md" "99 - Meta e Anexos/**/*.md"
scripts.lint: pnpm run lint:main && pnpm run lint:docs && pnpm run lint:templates
scripts.site:build: node scripts/clean_site_dist.mjs && pnpm --filter @aretw0/dgk-astro-plugins build && astro build
scripts.site:responsive: pnpm run site:build && pnpm run notebooks:export && node scripts/smoke_responsive.mjs
scripts.notebooks:etl: pnpm run notebooks:etl:demo && pnpm run feeds:opml && pnpm run outbox:prepare && pnpm run validate:texto && node scripts/prepare_lab_datasets.mjs
scripts.notebooks:extract:browser: uv run --no-project --with-requirements requirements.local-etl.txt playwright install chromium
scripts.validate: pnpm run actions:pins && pnpm run lint && pnpm run audit:ia && pnpm run site:audit:sidebar && pnpm run test && pnpm run validate:onboarding && pnpm run validate:pt-text && pnpm run validate:theme && pnpm run validate:mermaid && pnpm run validate:texto && pnpm run validate:apresentacoes && pnpm run site:graph-smoke && pnpm run site:check && pnpm run smoke:template && pnpm run smoke:init:reset && pnpm run smoke:user-vault && pnpm run smoke:e2e && pnpm run release:package:smoke
